title: Smart Contract Security Audit
description: Professional audit of your Solidity smart contracts. Includes gas optimization review, vulnerability analysis, and a written report with remediation steps. Ideal for DeFi protocols and NFT projects before mainnet deployment.

freelancer.bio: Senior blockchain engineer specializing in secure smart contract development and cross-chain protocol design. 6+ years building in Web3.

title: DeFi Yield Aggregator Integration
description: Integrate your protocol with major yield sources (Aave, Compound, Yearn). Build a unified interface for deposit/withdraw and automated rebalancing. Includes testing and documentation.

freelancer.bio: Senior blockchain engineer specializing in secure smart contract development and cross-chain protocol design. 6+ years building in Web3.

title: NFT Minting DApp (React + Ethers)
description: Full-stack NFT minting application: connect wallet, mint from your ERC-721 contract, view collection. Responsive UI with Tailwind, MetaMask/WalletConnect support. Delivery includes source code and deployment guide.

freelancer.bio: Frontend and Web3 developer. Built multiple NFT drops and marketplace UIs. Focus on clean UX and gas-efficient interactions.

title: The Graph Subgraph for Your Protocol
description: Design and deploy a subgraph for your smart contracts. Entity schema, event handlers, and GraphQL API. Hosted or self-hosted deployment. Optimized for low latency and correct ordering.

freelancer.bio: Frontend and Web3 developer. Built multiple NFT drops and marketplace UIs. Focus on clean UX and gas-efficient interactions.

title: Escrow Contract Review & Hardening
description: Review your escrow or payment contract for correctness and security. Covers deposit, release, dispute, and timeout logic. Deliverables: markdown report and optional fixes as patches.
